form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Bendigo (24.73) in a Special conditions H, finishing a 12 length sixth. Has two wins and five placings from 13 starts from the draw. Expected to be in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Stumbled at box rise and slow to begin.

form.formComment: Last start finished 7th over 390m at this track beaten 10 lengths (22.90) behind Paw Renalla in a Grade 5 on March 30. Strong form emerging from the that last run. Leading chance.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 390m in 22.80. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when seventh over 390m at this track at Grade 5 level. Major threat on best form.
